title: WVVI Stock Willamette Valley Vineyards (WVVI, $4.9) was a top gainer for penny stocks yesterday, jumping +10.89% to $4.9 per share
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
A.I.dvisor analyzed 41 other stocks in the [Beverages: Alcoholic](https://tickeron.com/tags/all/Industry-BeveragesAlcoholic) Industry and found that 28 of them (69.23%) are in an Uptrend while 13 of them (30.77%) are in a Downtrend.

# WVVI in -1.15% downward trend, falling for three consecutive days on August 27, 2025

Moving lower for three straight days is viewed as a bearish sign. Keep an eye on this stock for future declines. Considering data from situations where WVVI declined for three days, in 152 of 267 cases, the price declined further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 57%.
